zebra-cake-or-zebra-cake-with-chocolate-.name: Zebra Cake Or Zebra Cake With Chocolate Coverage
zebra-cake-or-zebra-cake-with-chocolate-.original_name: Bizcocho Cebra o Tarta Cebra con cobertura de chocolate

ingredients.item: 1 taza (250 ml) de leche a temperatura ambiente
3/4 de taza (250 ml) de aceite vegetal
50 g de chocolate a la taza de buena calidad (70%)

instructions: To purify the oven at 180 ° C Filling a 23 cm diameter cake mold. Fold chocolate into the microwave 30 seconds and book. With a hand mixer, beat the Sugar and egg into a bowl until the mixture is clear and sparkling. Add milk and oil and beat up and integrate the ingredients well.

En otro recipiente combinar la harina y la levadura en polvo. Gradualmente integrar la mezcla de harina a la de huevo y leche, batiendo solo lo necesario para integrar los ingredientes (la idea es no batir demasiado para no agregar aire a la mezcla, se puede batir con una cuchara de madera)

Dividir la mezcla en dos partes iguales, agregar a una la esencia de almendras y a la otra el cacao en polvo y el chocolate derretido. En el centro del molde refractario colocar 3 cucharadas de mezcla blanca e inmediatamente colocar 3 cucharadas de mezcla de chocolate.
Continue without stopping by alternating clear and dark mixture to complete. Important: Do not move or attempt to distribute the mixture into the container! It will be filled up progressively.
Bake for 40 minutes or until a stick gets clear. Let cool for 15 minutes, clear and finish cooling onto a grid.
zebra-cake-or-zebra-cake-with-chocolate-.category: Breakfast Recipes, Easy Beer Recipes, Home Fairy Recipes

zucchini-bread-with-cinnamon-sugar-toppi.name: Zucchini Bread With Cinnamon Sugar Topping
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Coat two 9x5-inch loaf pans with cooking spray.
Combine white sugar, zucchini, oil, eggs, and vanilla in a large bowl; stir in raisins.

Combine flour, baking soda, salt, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, and baking powder in a separate large bowl; whisk into zucchini mixture until almost no lumps remain. Divide batter between the prepared loaf pans.
Whisk brown sugar and ¼ teaspoon cinnamon together in a small bowl until well combined; sprinkle over batter in the loaf pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, about 1 hour. Cool in the pans for 10 minutes, then remove from the pans and finish cooling on a wire rack.

zucchini-herb-fritters-with-garlic-yogur.name: Zucchini-herb Fritters With Garlic Yogurt

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Mix yogurt, mint, lemon juice, oil, honey, and garlic in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper. Cover; chill.

Grate zucchini, potato, and onion on the large holes of a box grater. Transfer to a mesh sieve set over a bowl and toss with 2 tsp. salt. Let vegetables sit until they release their liquid, 30−40 minutes.

Mix eggs, garlic, cumin, 3 Tbsp. parsley, and 2 Tbsp. mint in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Gather up half of zucchini mixture in a kitchen towel; squeeze out excess liquid. Add to bowl with egg mixture and repeat with remaining zucchini mixture. Sprinkle flour and baking powder over; mix gently.

Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Working in batches, spoon scoops of mixture into skillet, flattening gently with a spatula. Cook until golden brown and crisp, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a wire rack; season with salt. Drizzle yogurt sauce with olive oil and top with more herbs; serve alongside warm fritters.
